subcodes.first_line: O Messenger! Hearken unto the utterance of the Intended One in the Persian tongue, that thou mayest partake of the wondrous bounties of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قاصد بیان مقصود را بلسان پارسی بشنو تا از بدایع الطاف رحمانیه بفیوضات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @knowledge; recognition of God, @free will and predestination; fate, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @names and attributes of God
